metadata.title: Projects | roda.dev
metadata.description: Gabriel Roda's professional projects across education, digital platforms, authoring, and learning experiences.

hero.title: Products, experiences, and tools built to improve how people learn.
hero.description: From learning object production to full authoring and digital reading platforms, this page organizes the projects that shaped my recent path in education and product work.

overview.title: A quick look at the evolution between content, product, and authoring.

closing.title: If any of these projects connects with what you are building, let's talk.
closing.description: I can help with front-end, educational product work, authoring, interfaces for internal operations, and digital experiences focused on clarity.

companySections.role: Front-end and digital experiences for education
companySections.summary: Creation of learning objects, learning paths, editorial platforms, and study experiences for thousands of higher education students.

projects.title: Learning Objects
projects.description: Development of animated and interactive materials in Adobe Captivate, with continuous evolution of the templates used by the team.
highlights: Built a navigation menu with the Captivate JavaScript API
Controls for captions, audio, and fullscreen mode
Maintenance of templates, voice-over work, and illustration and animation production

projects.title: Learning Path
projects.description: Redesign of the digital study experience with reusable HTML templates for multiple learning path formats.
highlights: Shared architecture for menus and interactions across different formats
Notes and highlights on selected passages with access through a global menu
Accessibility features, dynamic fetch, and dedicated pages for videos and objects

projects.title: Digital Book
projects.description: Responsive material creation platform with Firebase on the back end, focused on comfortable and customizable reading on mobile devices.
highlights: Real-time editing environment to replicate PDFs in HTML
Notes, highlights, and visual customization inspired by the Kindle experience
Undergraduate and graduate versions with responsive reading

projects.title: EdTech Content
projects.description: A central hub to guide teachers and teams on formats, templates, and production best practices for digital materials.
highlights: Format catalog with examples and downloadable templates
Tips section with Firebase for registration, listing, and reading
Notifications whenever a new tip is published

projects.title: Content Tagging
projects.description: A project to connect studied content with academic performance and show students, visually, where they should deepen their studies.
highlights: Linking learning paths, the book summary, and course topics
Classification of paragraphs, images, videos, and objects by faculty
Integration with grades to display performance indicators by topic

projects.title: Content Hub
projects.description: An expansion of tagging into a new discovery layer, dynamically gathering everything a student needs to review about a topic.
highlights: Dynamic search for related content in learning paths and books
Direct redirection to the exact passage inside the Digital Book
Guided experience based on performance indicators

projects.title: Learning Path Builder
projects.description: Browser-based path creation environment designed to speed up production and reduce dependence on technical knowledge.
highlights: Support for multiple learning path formats
Export of the complete package at the end of the process
Greater consistency for internal teams and external collaborators

projects.title: Interactive Resources
projects.description: Evolution of learning objects into a lighter, responsive, and more flexible HTML5 format than the previous Captivate flow.
highlights: Creation of templates for educational games and interactions
A new production process, from briefing to final delivery
More performance, responsiveness, and customization options

projects.title: Thematic Landing Pages
projects.description: A series of editorial pages for welcoming, institutional programs, and thematic communication within the Uniasselvi ecosystem.
highlights: Welcome pages, social responsibility, and extension projects
Experiences focused on discovering institutional information
Consistent visual execution across different themes and audiences

companySections.role: Digital product and front-end for educational platforms
companySections.summary: Work across maintenance, interface, and product strategy for catalog, marketplace, and SCORM authoring.

projects.title: DStore
projects.description: Maintenance and evolution of a platform for cataloging and organizing educational materials.
highlights: Implementation of new features and fixes
Improvements to flows and methodologies used by the team

projects.title: DStore Store
projects.description: Built the storefront interface for DStore, connecting the visual experience with the marketplace API.
highlights: Complete front-end implementation of the platform
API integration and UX/UI refinements throughout the process

projects.title: Autorya
projects.description: Authoring platform for SCORM materials followed from concept through launch.
highlights: Participation in strategic meetings and roadmap discussions
Contribution to improvements and new features
Delivery of a platform with layout customization, themes, and interactive blocks

companySections.role: Authoring, operations, and automation platforms for digital content
companySections.summary: Work across a family of products connecting authoring, storage, analytics, AI, and commercial operations in a broader digital ecosystem.

projects.title: Liviu Content
projects.description: Full authoring platform developed from conception, focused on creating, reviewing, and publishing digital materials in different formats.
highlights: Export to SCORM, PDF, or online publishing by link
Creation of materials in slide or one-page formats
35 element types with theme variants for fast customization
Adaptive learning with personalized paths and performance nodes

projects.title: Liviu Drive
projects.description: A file-drive-inspired platform for storing, organizing, and sharing documents within the company's ecosystem.
highlights: Experience focused on file organization and sharing
Complete development with AWS Amplify
Participation across the stack, from repository to deploy

projects.title: Liviu Flow
projects.description: Collaborative project manager with customizable flows that turn recurring steps into reusable processes.
highlights: Configurable flows that work as task templates
Deliveries that automatically receive multiple tasks from a flow
Tasks with owners, status, priority, dates, comments, and files
Support for subtasks and links between related tasks

projects.title: Liviu Analytics
projects.description: Analytics tool designed to integrate directly with content created in Liviu Content and track navigation and behavior.
highlights: Creation of question forms in an experience similar to Google Forms
Tracking tags that generate scripts for event capture
Integration between published content and usage data

projects.title: Monday Panels
projects.description: Lean platform to share Monday boards with clients and give them visibility into project progress.
highlights: Simplified sharing of external boards
Experience focused on client-side project follow-up

projects.title: AI Playground
projects.description: Playground to explore AI models and automated workflows, expanding the team's command of AWS and Bedrock tools.
highlights: Interaction with multiple AI models in the same environment
Workflow tests such as automatic subtitle generation for video
Implementation with AWS Amplify and Bedrock models

projects.title: Liviu CRM
projects.description: Platform for creating business proposals with product composition, discounts, taxes, and final presentation generation.
highlights: Registration of products, categories, and subcategories
Proposal building and saving with PPT output
Per-item calculation with discount, subtotal, taxes, and final value
